request_payload.exposure_text: 🚨 Just saw this in my local news: a group of activists disrupted a routine security drill in our city last month. They claimed it was 'militarization of police,' but what if this kind of interference makes us less prepared for real threats? Our security agencies need the flexibility to adapt without constant legal challenges. #CommunitySafetyFirst #SupportOurSecurity
